code: /** Client inactivity timeout before sign-out (default 1 minute). */export const SESSION_IDLE_MS=Number(process.env.REACT_APP_SESSION_IDLE_MS)||60000;/** Throttle token refresh calls while the user is active. */export const SESSION_REFRESH_THROTTLE_MS=30000;export const AUTH_TOKEN_REFRESHED_EVENT='auth:token-refreshed';export function notifyTokenRefreshed(){if(typeof window==='undefined')return;window.dispatchEvent(new Event(AUTH_TOKEN_REFRESHED_EVENT));}
